title: Acetosella eriorhiza
intro: Acetosella eriorhiza, also known as the Renga Renga Lily or Parrot's Beak, is a species of flowering plant in the family Colchicaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and infection, due to its potential antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Acetosella eriorhiza include colchicine and its derivatives, which are responsible for the plant's pharmacological activities. In herbal medicine, the plant is often made into a tincture or a syrup, which can be used to treat conditions such as arthritis and gout.
